member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Agents.ConfiguredAgent
member.summary: The default runtime representation of an agent defined via configuration.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Engine.DefaultAgentFactory
member.summary: A default implementation of IAgentFactory that allows dynamic registration of agent types.
Registers a new agent type with a factory delegate.
member.param: The string identifier for the agent type (e.g. "Standard").
The function to create the agent.

member.name: M:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Engine.DefaultAgentFactory.CreateAgent(VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Models.AgentConfig,VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.ILlmClient,VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IAgentLogger,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.ITool})
member.summary: Creates a configured agent instance based on the configuration type.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Engine.SequentialWorkflowEngine
member.summary: A workflow engine that executes agents in a strict sequential order, passing outputs as inputs to subsequent agents.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IAgent
member.summary: Represents an AI agent capable of executing instructions using a specific LLM and toolset.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IAgentFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating agent instances based on configuration types.

member.name: M:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IAgentFactory.CreateAgent(VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Models.AgentConfig,VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.ILlmClient,VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IAgentLogger,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.ITool})
member.param: The configuration specifying the agent type.
The LLM client to be injected into the agent.
The logger to be injected into the agent.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IConfigurationProvider
member.summary: Provides configuration data for agents and workflows from an external source (e.g. YAML files).

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.ILlmClientFactory
member.summary: Factory for instantiating the appropriate LLM client based on agent configuration.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IToolRegistry
member.summary: Central registry for dynamically resolving and providing tools to agents.

member.name: M:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IToolRegistry.GetTools(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Resolves and returns a collection of tools matching the given names.
member.param: The names of the tools to resolve.
member.returns: A collection of instantiated ITool objects.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Interfaces.IWorkflowEngine
member.summary: Represents the execution engine responsible for orchestrating multi-agent workflows.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Models.AgentConfig
member.summary: Represents the configuration of an AI agent, typically deserialized from YAML.

member.name: T:VenEl.DynamicAgents.Core.Models.WorkflowConfig
member.summary: Represents a multi-agent workflow configuration containing sequential steps.
